title: Leashed
description: A silly datapack that allows to leash players to any entity
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/753f0cff01bf4d5266c0743808fe4e5a555ac4d8.png)
# Was inspired by [PeenixSC](https://www.youtube.com/@PhoenixSC)'s [video](https://youtu.be/tp8V0VmHyFU&t=25)
**This datapack was created for my video to play with friends. Found bug / order datapack / other - [Discord](https://discord.gg/dCWyMsE94D).**

**This datapack was intended to add the ability to leash a player to any entity.**

<details>
<summary>Showcase</summary>

## [ 1 ] Leashing

![Leashing](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d87dba04b7708ada84e06318bc2a4e8c87315ea2.gif)

## [ 2 ] Players to entity

![Two player one pig](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/833f1bfa617c215b776224dfda1fc2487064b807.png)

## [ 3 ] [More in gallery](https://modrinth.com/datapack/leashed/gallery)
</details>

# Usage explanation:

Using the command, issue yourself a “Self-Lead”, using it you can leash yourself to any entity. Here are all the notes and commands:

- Give "Self-Lead" - **/function leashed:give_lead**;
- The "Self-Lead" item is not spent when used;
- A leader becomes immortal;
- Visualization of the lead is made by a straight line of particles;
- Which can be switched with - **/function leashed:gamerules/visual**;
- Up to five players can be leashed to a single entity;
- Because of the modifying and calculating motion, when a player is away from his “Leader”, the **game starts to lag** decently;
- You can only be unleashed using the command - **/function leashed:unleash**, it also kills the Leader;
- The current version of the datapack requires the [Modify Player Data](https://modrinth.com/mod/modify-player-data) mod.

<details>
<summary>FAQ about mod:</summary>
  
**Q: Where should I download the mod?**

**A:** If you are playing with friends LAN, **only hosting player** needs to download. If you play on a server, then **only in the server folder**. It's okay if someone also has a mod.

**Q: Why do I need to download this mod?**

**A:** This mod allows you to modify the player's NBT data, and the most important thing is **Motion**.

**Q: What about other alternatives from Minecraft itself?**

**A:** I was shaking my mouth at these alternatives. You can simply push the player only by levitation or invisible slimes, which cannot be normally invisible if summoned for a moment. And in any case, I made this datapack without worrying about optimization, further use after video or about other users, so I think you can accept it.
  
</details>
